name: Acer Aspire Lite
description: A budget-friendly laptop for basic everyday tasks.
review_snippets: Keyboard is a bit mushy. Good for the price.

name: MacBook Air M1
description: Incredibly thin and light with unmatched battery life.
review_snippets: Best battery ever. Screen is gorgeous.

name: Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 3
description: Reliable everyday performer with a decent screen.
review_snippets: Gets the job done, but battery drains fast if watching videos.

name: ASUS ROG Strix
description: Heavy-duty gaming beast with RGB and top-tier cooling.
review_snippets: Runs every game perfectly, but it's very heavy to carry.

name: HP Pavilion Aero
description: Ultra-lightweight champion, perfect for frequent travelers.
review_snippets: So light I forget it's in my bag! Fast performance.
